response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering practices and has relevant IDE experience from LabWindows/CVI development, there is a critical skills mismatch. The role requires deep expertise in Java, Kotlin, Spring, and other enterprise JVM frameworks—areas where this candidate has minimal recent experience (last Java work was 2018, no Kotlin experience). The candidate's career trajectory has strongly diverged toward polyglot web development (TypeScript, Node.js, D), not JVM specialization, making them unable to contribute effectively to this enterprise IDE role without substantial ramp-up.
strengths: Proven IDE/language tooling experience from LabWindows/CVI development demonstrates understanding of IDE internals and architecture
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, clean architecture, and collaborative development across multiple complex systems
History of rapid skill acquisition and adaptability across diverse technology stacks and domains
concerns: Critical gap in Java expertise—last significant Java work was 8+ years ago; current skills focus on TypeScript and web technologies, not JVM platforms
Zero experience with Kotlin, Spring ecosystem, Hibernate, or any enterprise Java frameworks listed as core requirements
Career trajectory shows polyglot generalist approach rather than deep specialization in JVM tooling; would require substantial ramp-up to be productive in this role

key_factors.factor: Kotlin knowledge and deep JVM understanding
